product.name: Color
product.description: Defines the primary color or pattern, such as blue or striped

product.name: Light temperature
product.description: Defines the color characteristics of light sources, such as warm white or daylight

product.name: Mounting type
product.description: Specifies how a product is installed or attached, such as clip-on or suction cup

product.name: Bulb cap type
product.description: Specifies the type of cap or base a light bulb or fixture has, e.g. E12, GU10

product.name: Cover material
product.description: Identifies the type of fabric or material used in the product's cover, such as silk or cotton

product.name: Decoration material
product.description: Identifies the material used for decoration, such as sequins or feathers

product.name: Vase shape
product.description: Describes the geometric or organic form of a vase, such as round or bottle

product.name: Material
product.description: Defines a product's primary material, such as cotton or wool

product.name: Suitable space
product.description: Defines the ideal location for product use, e.g. indoors, above ground

product.name: Style
product.description: Describes the style of a product, typically for window treatments; e.g. vertical blind, pleated shades

product.name: Seat type
product.description: Describes the design of a chair or bench seat, such as padded or bucket

product.name: Upholstery material
product.description: Identifies the fabric used for upholstery, such as leather or velvet

product.name: Furniture/Fixture features
product.description: Highlights special characteristics of furniture or fixtures, like adjustable shelves or built-in mirror

product.name: Bedding size
product.description: Defines the size category for bedding items, e.g. standard, king

product.name: Bedding pieces included
product.description: Specifies the components included in a bedding set, e.g. pillowcase, top sheet

product.name: Fabric
product.description: Identifies the type of fabric used in a product, for example, cotton or denim

product.name: Sleeve length type
product.description: Specifies the style of sleeves on clothing items, such as short or sleeveless

product.name: Age group
product.description: Defines the target age range for a product, such as adults or kids

product.name: Neckline
product.description: Used to describe the neck shape of a garment, such as V-neck or boat

product.name: Target gender
product.description: Identifies the intended gender for a product, such as female, male or unisex

product.name: Skirt/Dress length type
product.description: Defines the length of skirts or dresses, such as mini or maxi

product.name: Dress occasion
product.description: Specifies the intended occasion for a dress, e.g. holiday, everyday

product.name: Dress style
product.description: Identifies the design of a dress, such as wrap or empire waist

product.name: Outerwear clothing features
product.description: Identifies special characteristics of outerwear, like insulated or waterproof

product.name: Pants length type
product.description: Used to defines the length of pants, such as cropped or long

product.name: One-piece style
product.description: Identifies the specific style of a one-piece garment, like a jumpsuit or romper

product.name: Top length type
product.description: Defines the length of tops or shirts, like crop top or long

product.name: Fit
product.description: Describes the fit of a garment, typically pant shape; e.g. skinny leg, wide

product.name: Waist rise
product.description: Indicates where on the waist a garment sits, like low, medium or high

product.name: Size
product.description: Used to specify the size of a product, such as 0-3 months or Extra large (XL)

product.name: Best uses
product.description: Highlights optimal activities for product use, like traveling, hiking, or diving

product.name: Skirt style
product.description: Describes the design or cut of a skirt, such as pencil or pleated

product.name: Clothing features
product.description: Describes unique properties of apparel, such as water resistant or wrinkle resistant

product.name: Closure type
product.description: Defines the method used to fasten or secure a product, such as zipper or buckles

product.name: Shoe size
product.description: Used to define the size of footwear, e.g. Extra large (XL), 9.5

product.name: Toe style
product.description: Defines the shape or design of a shoe's toe, such as open or pointed

product.name: Occasion style
product.description: Helps categorize products based on occasion, e.g. casual, dress

product.name: Footwear material
product.description: Specifies the type of material used in footwear, such as suede or rubber

product.name: Toy/Game material
product.description: Identifies the main material used in a toy or game, such as plastic or wood

product.name: Dog age group
product.description: Helps sort dog supplies according to the dog's life stage, e.g. puppy, senior

product.name: Dog toy type
product.description: Classifies the type of dog toy, such as plush or squeaky

product.name: Suitable for breed size
product.description: Identifies the appropriate breed size for pet products, such as large or medium

product.name: Package type
product.description: Defines the type of packaging for a product, e.g. jar, pump

product.name: Pet dietary requirements
product.description: Defines the nutritional benefits provided by a pet product, such as weight control or dental health

product.name: Pet food flavor
product.description: Specifies the taste profile of pet food products, e.g. banana, turkey

product.name: Pet food form
product.description: Indicates the consistency of pet food products, such as wet or dry

product.name: Pet food supplements
product.description: Identifies additives in pet food for nutritional benefits, like fish oil or probiotics

product.name: Cat age group
product.description: Defines products suitable for specific cat life stages, e.g. kitten, senior

product.name: Fish type
product.description: Helps match to specific fish species, such as tropical or cold water

product.name: Suitable for fish type
product.description: Specifies the type of fish a product is intended for, e.g. pond fish, tropical fish

product.name: Suitable for bird type
product.description: Matches products to specific bird species, e.g. canary, parrot

product.name: Product rating
product.description: Average rating from customers

product.name: Product rating count
product.description: Total number of ratings from customers
